name: nat-vent-indoor-hot-outdoor-near-comfort
description: Hot interior (78F) with outdoor near comfort (74F) — activates since outdoor < indoor and outdoor < threshold

verdict.summary: When indoor is at or below the ceiling and outdoor is below both indoor and threshold, nat vent activates
verdict.observed_behavior: natural_ventilation: outdoor(74) < indoor(78), outdoor(74) < threshold(81), indoor(78) <= ceiling(78)
verdict.expected_behavior: natural_ventilation: outdoor(74) < indoor(78), outdoor(74) < threshold(81), indoor(78) <= ceiling(78)

events.note: hot interior; outdoor 74F is below indoor(78) and below threshold(81). comfort_cool raised to 78 (== indoor) so Issue #392's archetype-aware ceiling gate (default/HVAC-fan archetype) does not block this directional-activation scenario.

assertions.reason: outdoor 74F < indoor 78F (beneficial); outdoor 74F < threshold 81F; indoor 78F > comfort_heat 70F; indoor 78F <= ceiling_threshold 78F — nat vent activates for hot-day free cooling
